title: opencode-swarm v6.36.0 — Phase Drift Verification + Curator Pipeline + Stack Trace Fix

tasks.description: Re-audit phase-end verification code paths. Write implementation notes to .swarm/evidence/phase-wiring-audit.md.
Re-audit curator pipeline wiring. Write implementation notes to .swarm/evidence/curator-wiring-audit.md.
Update architect PHASE-WRAP instructions in src/agents/architect.ts with critic_drift_verifier delegation before phase_complete.
Register critic_drift_verifier as a separate agent in src/agents/index.ts following the critic_sounding_board pattern.
Fix the core timing bug in phase-complete.ts where curator-drift writes drift-verifier.json after the gate checks for it. Remove runCriticDriftCheck, replace with readPriorDriftReports advisory.
Tighten enforcement for missing spec.md. When spec.md absent and drift evidence missing, use plan.json fallback comparison basis instead of silent auto-approval.
Restrict turbo mode bypasses by adding optional sessionID parameter to hasActiveTurboMode() in state.ts.
Verify and fix curator pipeline outputs. curateAndStoreSwarm now returns {stored, skipped, rejected}. Advisory message includes knowledge stats.
Fix curator knowledge update path. Category inference now covers all 9 KnowledgeCategory values. Added 'archived' to status union.
Rename runCriticDriftCheck to runDeterministicDriftCheck in curator-drift.ts and all test files.
Add curator pipeline health integration test proving curator enabled, init/phase run, output written, output consumed.

phases.name: Fix Stack Trace Leakage from Tool Failures (Hotfix)

tasks.description: Fix update_task_status error serialization. Replace errors: [String(error)] at line 672 with error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error). Sanitize console.warn at line 210-212 to use message-only handling.

Add generic tool-error sanitization wrapper in src/tools/create-tool.ts. Wrap the execute call in try/catch returning sanitized JSON error instead of raw stack traces. Never surface host runtime paths.

Sweep all TUI-visible error leakage paths. Fix raw String(error) in tool return values: save-plan.ts:255, curator-analyze.ts:121. Fix raw console.warn/error with error object: phase-complete.ts safeWarn (line 68-74), build-check.ts:318, rollback.ts:133, commands/knowledge.ts (4 instances at lines 35,61,97,141). Fix raw String(error) in commands: promote.ts:75,86, curate.ts:58.

Add regression tests: update-task-status returns only error message not stack frames; thrown error from wrapped tool returns sanitized JSON; sanitized text does not contain internal runtime paths or stack frame patterns. New test file for create-tool.ts wrapper.
Add end-to-end phase completion validation test proving critic drift verification, evidence persistence, phase_complete success.
Add bypass behavior validation tests covering normal mode with/without spec, turbo mode, curator disabled, critic drift missing.
Verify all prompt modernization sections remain present in agent files. No regressions from Phase 2 changes.
Record guardrails decomposition as deferred tech debt in .swarm/evidence/deferred-tech-debt.md. No code changes.
Run full acceptance: bun test passes, bunx biome ci passes, bun run typecheck passes. Verify SC-001 through SC-010.
Create release notes at docs/releases/v6.36.0.md. Cover drift verification, curator fixes, spec absence handling, turbo scope restriction, stack trace leakage fix, and deferred items.
